story.iWant: an async wrapper around MediaPipe ImageGenerator
story.soThat: image generation doesn't block the UI thread
story.tasks: - Task 1: Add MediaPipe dependency and gradle configuration - Task 2: Create ImageGenerationHelper wrapper class - Task 3: Implement inference loop with progress emission - Task 4: Implement error handling and resource cleanup - Task 5: Integration testing and validation

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Given a valid prompt and iteration count, when generateImage(prompt, iterations, seed) is called, then generation runs on background thread (Dispatchers.Default)
Given generation is in progress, when progress updates occur, then progress is emitted via Flow<GenerationProgress> with step count and intermediate images
Given generation completes successfully, when final bitmap is ready, then it's returned as GenerationResult.Success(bitmap)
Given an error occurs during generation, when the error is caught, then it's returned as GenerationResult.Error(message)
Given generation completes, when cleanup occurs, then MediaPipe resources are properly released to prevent memory leaks

artifact.title: Epic 7: AI Image Generation
artifact.snippet: As a developer, I want an async wrapper around MediaPipe ImageGenerator, so that image generation doesn't block the UI thread. Create ImageGenerationHelper.kt following MediaPipe codelab pattern with blocking inference on Dispatchers.Default.

artifact.title: OnDevice AI Architecture
artifact.snippet: Helper classes encapsulate MediaPipe SDK interaction. Follow LlmChatModelHelper pattern: initialize with createFromOptions(), wrap blocking operations in coroutines, emit results via callbacks/flows, cleanup in finally blocks.

artifact.title: Product Requirements Document
artifact.snippet: Generate images from text prompts entirely on-device using Stable Diffusion. No internet required, privacy-preserving, 512x512 output, 15-60 second generation time on mid-range devices.

artifact.reason: Contains TODO placeholders for Story 7.2 - initializeModelFn() and cleanUpModelFn() methods need to be implemented using the new ImageGenerationHelper
Reference pattern for MediaPipe SDK wrapper - shows initialize(), cleanup, callback patterns. ImageGenerationHelper should follow similar structure but adapted for image generation API.

Defines Stable Diffusion model configuration: URL, size (1.9GB), isZip=true, unzipDir="sd15". Model path construction via getPath() method (line 240-267) extracts to externalFilesDir/Stable_diffusion/_/sd15/
MediaPipe dependency already included: implementation(libs.mediapipe.tasks.imagegen) - verify version matches v0.10.21+ requirement
OpenCL native library declarations for GPU acceleration (from Story 7.0) - required for MediaPipe ImageGenerator performance

constraints.constraint: Use Dispatchers.Default for CPU-bound image generation - not IO or Main thread
Emit progress via Flow<GenerationProgress> - do not use callbacks for streaming updates
Follow MediaPipe API pattern: ImageGenerator.createFromOptions(), setInputs(), execute() loop
Release resources in finally block - call imageGenerator.close() to prevent memory leaks
Handle MediaPipeException and IllegalArgumentException with descriptive error messages
Model path from Model.getPath(context) resolves to externalFilesDir/Stable_diffusion/_/sd15/
Generation parameters: prompt (String), iterations (Int, 5-50 range), seed (Int for reproducibility)
Output format: Bitmap at 512x512 resolution (Stable Diffusion v1.5 default)

interface.name: CustomTask.initializeModelFn
interface.signature: fun initializeModelFn(context: Context, coroutineScope: CoroutineScope, model: Model, onDone: (String) -> Unit)
interface.note: ImageGenerationTaskModule must implement this to initialize ImageGenerationHelper with model path from model.getPath(context)

interface.name: CustomTask.cleanUpModelFn
interface.signature: fun cleanUpModelFn(context: Context, coroutineScope: CoroutineScope, model: Model, onDone: () -> Unit)
interface.note: ImageGenerationTaskModule must implement this to release ImageGenerationHelper resources and call imageGenerator.close()

interface.name: ImageGenerationHelper.generateImage
interface.signature: suspend fun generateImage(context: Context, modelPath: String, prompt: String, iterations: Int, seed: Int): Flow<GenerationResult>
interface.note: Primary inference function - wraps MediaPipe ImageGenerator, returns Flow of GenerationProgress and final GenerationResult

interface.name: GenerationProgress
interface.signature: data class GenerationProgress(val step: Int, val total: Int, val intermediateBitmap: Bitmap?)
interface.note: Emitted during inference to show progress - intermediateBitmap available every 5 steps

interface.name: GenerationResult
interface.signature: sealed class GenerationResult { data class Success(val bitmap: Bitmap) : GenerationResult(); data class Error(val message: String) : GenerationResult() }
interface.note: Final result type - Success contains generated Bitmap, Error contains error message

tests.standards: Follow existing MediaPipe helper testing patterns from LlmChatModelHelper. Use JUnit5 for unit tests, Espresso for UI tests. Mock MediaPipe dependencies where possible. Integration tests require actual model download (1.9GB) - run on device/emulator with 8GB+ RAM. Verify memory cleanup with Android Profiler.

ideas.test-idea: Verify generateImage() executes on Dispatchers.Default thread - assert Thread.currentThread() is not MainThread
Mock ImageGenerator.execute() loop - verify Flow emits GenerationProgress for each step with correct step/total counts
Mock successful generation - verify final Flow emission is GenerationResult.Success with non-null Bitmap
Mock MediaPipeException throw - verify Flow emits GenerationResult.Error with exception message
Integration test - generate image, verify imageGenerator.close() called even on exception (use try-finally verification)
